ddls:
CREATE TABLE "login_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login event */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the login attempt */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user attempting to log in */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Success status of the login attempt (1 = success, 0 = failure) */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for login failure (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the login event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session associated with the login event */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the login attempt */,
  "location_info" TEXT /* Additional location details (e.g., ISP, organization) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the login attempt */,
  "ssh_key_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if a SSH key was used for the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_events_source_ip FOREIGN KEY ("source_ip") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time when the account is locked out due to multiple failed attempts */,
  "password_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the password will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the IP address is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the IP address is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the IP address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the IP address */,
  "isp" TEXT /* Internet Service Provider (ISP) of the IP address */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization associated with the IP address */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last time the IP address was seen in a login event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat feed */,
  "feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the threat feed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the threat feed */,
  "feed_format" TEXT /* Format of the threat feed (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of threat feed (e.g., malware, phishing, botnet) */,
  "feed_status" TEXT /* Status of the feed (e.g., active, inactive, error) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Last time the feed was synchronized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the login event that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of security alert (e.g., brute-force, suspicious activity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high, critical) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst assigned to the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES login_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_group" TEXT /* Category of the configuration setting (e.g., security, performance, notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_group" TEXT /* Category of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the login event or system activity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES login_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., security alert, system update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, failed) */,
  "read_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_address_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical IP address entry */,
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the login event associated with the IP address */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, failed attempt) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_address_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES login_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_address_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_address_history_ip_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_id")
)
